description: This file contains functions for extracting a person's name and current role/title from unstructured text, with special handling for categorized documents like resumes, job descriptions, and performance reviews. It includes logic for parsing combined document blobs, selecting the most relevant text segments, and heuristics for identifying names and roles.

methods.name: _splitCombinedTextIntoCategoryBlocks
methods.description: Parses combined text with category headers into category-aware blocks.

methods.name: _selectBestTextFromCombinedOrOrchestrationText
methods.description: Selects the most relevant text block for extraction, prioritizing resume category.

methods.name: _selectBestTextForNameExtraction
methods.description: Chooses the best text segment for name extraction, with resume precedence.

methods.name: extractNameAndCurrentRole
methods.description: Extracts a person's name and role from unstructured text, using heuristics and pattern matching.

methods.name: extractBestNameAndRoleFromDocuments
methods.description: Derives the best-effort name and role from a set of categorized documents, with fallback logic.

methods.name: _looksLikeGenericDocumentLabel
methods.description: Checks if a candidate string resembles a generic document label to avoid false positives.
